framework.name: Five-Protocol Multi-Agent AI Architecture
framework.description: A structured approach to building multi-agent AI systems using five key protocols: MCP (Model Context Protocol), ACP (Agent Communication Protocol), A2A (Agent-to-Agent Protocol), ANP (Agent Network Protocol), and AG-UI (Agent-User Interaction Protocol). This creates a comprehensive ecosystem for autonomous agents to collaborate.
framework.raw_quote: For those looking to build scalable multi-agent AI systems, it's essential to understand five key protocols: MCP (Model Context Protocol), ACP (Agent Communication Protocol), A2A (Agent-to-Agent Protocol), ANP (Agent Network Protocol), and AG-UI (Agent-User Interaction Protocol).
